name: APPFOLIO INC
summary: Unless otherwise stated in this Annual Report, references to "AppFolio," "we," "us," and "our" refer to AppFolio, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries. Overview Founded in 2006, AppFolio is a technology leader powering the future of real estate. We provide a cloud-based platform, the AppFolio Platform, on which our customers operate their businesses.
